name: Fresh Tomato Soup Ala Terri
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground white pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Remove the bouquet garni from the boiling water and discard.
3. In a large pot, melt butter over medium heat. Add olive oil and sauté onions until translucent.
4. Gradually whisk in flour, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
5. Slowly add boiling water, stirring continuously to combine.
6. Simmer the mixture for 15 minutes, uncovered, stirring occasionally.
7. Remove from heat and blend the soup using an immersion blender or a regular blender.
8. Return the blended soup to the pot and stir in sour cream and chopped dill.
9. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
10. Serve hot, garnished with additional dill if desired.
